queries.question: Provide me with the format names common to all broadcasts
queries.sql: SELECT Formats.format_name  from Broadcasts_Formats join Formats on Broadcasts_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Broadcasts on Broadcasts_Formats.broadcast_id = Broadcasts.id   GROUP BY Broadcasts_Formats.format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Broadcasts_Formats.broadcast_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Broadcasts)

queries.question: For all broadcasts, provide the format names associated with that broadcast
queries.sql: select broadcasts.title , formats.format_name from Broadcasts_Formats join Formats on Broadcasts_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Broadcasts on Broadcasts_Formats.broadcast_id = Broadcasts.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?format_name WHERE {
  ?broadcasts_formats a :Broadcasts_Formats .
  ?formats a :Formats .
  ?broadcasts_formats p:hasFormats ?formats .
  ?broadcasts a :Broadcasts .
  ?broadcasts_formats p:hasBroadcasts ?broadcasts .
  ?broadcasts p:title ?title .
  ?formats p:format_name ?format_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What format is used in each broadcast?
